channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anne Waiguru and Hassan Omar clash over claims of ethnic rhetoric in Kenyan politics
item.description: Kirinyaga Governor Anne Waiguru has publicly criticised United Democratic Alliance (UDA) Secretary General Hassan Omar following his controversial remarks that were perceived to target leaders from th...

item.title: Gqeberha family mourns father and colleague after fatal dairy farm cooling tank incident
item.description: A Gqeberha family is in deep mourning after 54-year-old Henry Swartz died while on duty at a dairy farm in Humansdorp, along with his 27-year-old colleague, Hussain Jbonomau. The two men, both employe...

item.title: Armed suspect fatally shot after approaching White House security checkpoint
item.description: A suspect is dead following an incident near the White House after allegedly approaching a security checkpoint while armed, according to the U.S. Secret Service. The event occurred in Washington, D.C....

item.title: Brigitte Bardot Dies at 91 After Decades as Film Star and Animal Rights Activist
item.description: French actress, singer, and cultural icon Brigitte Bardot died at the age of 91 at her home in southern France, according to a statement released by her foundation on December 28, 2025. Bardot became ...

item.title: Sindh government confirms three-day Eidul Azha holiday from May 26–28, WFH on May 29
item.description: The Sindh government has officially revised its earlier notification regarding Eidul Azha holidays and now confirmed a three-day public holiday across the province. According to a corrigendum issued o...

item.title: Researchers Show Micro-Rough Surfaces Can Reduce Aerodynamic Drag More Effectively Than Smooth Ones
item.description: Researchers at Tohoku University in Japan have reported experimental evidence suggesting that extremely fine, irregular surface textures can reduce aerodynamic drag more effectively than perfectly smo...

item.title: Rethinking African Unity: A Case for a Potential State of Azania
item.description: The opinion piece reflects on the historical and political roots of Africa’s current challenges, beginning with the 1884–1885 Berlin Conference, which the author argues entrenched Africa’s role as a s...

item.title: Fonz shares how viral skit led to unexpected job offer from Kris Aquino
item.description: Content creator Fonz shared an unexpected career moment after a viral skit online led to a surprising opportunity from television personality Kris Aquino. In an interview published by ABS-CBN’s entert...

item.title: Railway explosion and gunfire in Quetta kill at least 24 people amid Baloch insurgency
item.description: At least 24 people were killed and more than 50 injured after an explosion struck a railway track in Quetta, the capital of Pakistan’s Balochistan province. According to reports, the blast derailed a ...

item.title: Kenyans Mourn Veteran Sports Commentator Diblo Kaberia Following Emotional Final Facebook Message
item.description: Kenyan football fans and social media users are mourning the death of veteran sports commentator Diblo Kaberia Elmago, whose final Facebook post has emotionally touched many people online. Diblo, who ...

item.title: Peter Msigwa and Joseph Selasini return to Chadema after leaving CCM and other parties
item.description: Former Iringa Urban MP Peter Msigwa has officially left CCM and returned to Chadema, only one day after former Rombo MP Joseph Selasini also rejoined the opposition party. The two political comebacks ...

item.title: Debate grows over disclosure rules for paid political influencers in California gubernatorial race
item.description: The article examines the growing influence of social media creators in American politics and the increasing concern over undisclosed payments to influencers promoting political candidates. During the ...

item.title: Shack fire in Pretoria informal settlement claims one life and affects about 150 homes
item.description: A devastating shack fire at the Plastic View informal settlement in Moreleta Park, Pretoria, has left one person dead and caused widespread destruction to homes. Emergency services from the City of Ts...

item.title: 150 pastoralist women in Manyara granted customary land ownership certificates to boost land rights
item.description: A total of 150 women from pastoralist communities in Simanjiro and Kiteto districts in Tanzania’s Manyara Region have been issued with customary land ownership certificates in an initiative aimed at s...

item.title: Chadema Leaders Injured in Violent Attack in Songea Amid Rising Political Tensions
item.description: Reports from Songea in southern Tanzania indicate that leaders from the main opposition party, Chadema (Chama cha Demokrasia na Maendeleo), were attacked with machetes in a violent incident that has r...

item.title: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith says no future separation referendum will be held if voters reject separation in October
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith says she will not pursue another referendum on Alberta separation if voters reject the proposal in a planned October vote. During recent public remarks, Smith confirmed ...

item.title: Growing elite and public dissatisfaction in Russia amid war strain and economic pressure
item.description: The article examines increasing signs of discontent within parts of Russia’s political elite and wider society regarding President Vladimir Putin, as the war in Ukraine and domestic economic pressures...

item.title: Philippine Pickleball Federation prepares for tougher competition in World Cup 2026
item.description: The Philippine Pickleball Federation is preparing for what it expects to be a more competitive edition of the Pickleball World Cup in 2026, according to a report by ABS-CBN News. As the sport continue...

item.title: Analysis of Fubara’s Political Struggles and Trust Issues in Abuja APC Primaries
item.description: This opinion piece looks into the political tension surrounding Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara and his alleged fallout with key power blocs in Abuja during the APC governorship primaries. The...

item.title: Iran relocates 2026 FIFA World Cup training base to Mexico over US visa concerns
item.description: Iran’s national football team has moved its training base for the 2026 FIFA World Cup from Tucson, Arizona, to Tijuana, Mexico, after FIFA approved a request linked to visa complications and ongoing g...
